text: Rick D-99 was a member of SEAL Team Ricks who was sent by the Citadel of Ricks to assassinate Rick Sanchez (C-137). He was clearly among the toughest and most dangerous Ricks as he was part of their elite assassination unit. His body was used by Rick C-137 in his elaborate plot to destroy the Galactic Federation. He was blown up when C-137 took control of a higher-class Rick and ordered another Rick to blow him up.
